title: Short title
doc_html:
§2182. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Protection for Victims of Sexual Assault Act".

            Acts 2015, No. 242, §3.
doc_text:
§2182.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Protection for Victims of
Sexual Assault Act".
Acts 2015, No. 242, §3.
